ideas.title: reaction timer
ideas.description: wait for green, tap. shows your time in ms. records best.

ideas.title: memory dots
ideas.description: show a 4-dot sequence on a 3x3 grid, fade, then user reproduces it. levels up by 1 each round.

ideas.title: color match
ideas.description: show a target color; tap one of 4 swatches that matches. progressively harder.

ideas.title: tap-the-odd
ideas.description: grid of 9 tiles, one is a slightly different shade. tap it. level up by reducing the contrast.

ideas.title: swap-2
ideas.description: small puzzle: 4 colored tiles; swap two at a time to reach the goal order. 4-move max.

ideas.title: estimate
ideas.description: show a dotted scatter for 0.4 s, then ask user to estimate count. score by closeness.

ideas.title: rhythm tap
ideas.description: metronome ticks at 90 bpm; the user must tap on the beat for 8 bars. score is closeness.
